scheme.name: MSME Innovative Scheme (Incubation, Design and IPR)

provider.name: Ministry of MSME (via recognized Host Institutes)

benefits.name: Incubation support for innovative ideas
benefits.summary: Financial assistance routed through recognized Host Institutes to develop and nurture innovative ideas of MSMEs and innovators, covering prototype development and commercialization support.
benefits.calculation_logic: Up to 15 lakh per approved innovative idea to the Host Institute for developing/nurturing the idea. Separately, up to 1 crore to a Host Institute for plant and machinery to strengthen incubation facilities.

benefits.name: Design project financial assistance
benefits.summary: Financial assistance for engaging professional design expertise for new product development and improvement of existing products, plus support for student design projects.
benefits.calculation_logic: Up to 40 lakh per design project for individual MSMEs (75pct for micro, 60pct for small/medium). Student design projects up to 2.5 lakh. Disbursed in phases (40pct concept, 30pct detailed design, 30pct post-prototype).

benefits.name: Reimbursement for IPR registration (patent, trademark, GI, design)
benefits.summary: One-time reimbursement of expenditure incurred by MSMEs on registering patents, trademarks, geographical indications and designs, to strengthen IP protection and commercialization.
benefits.calculation_logic: Reimbursement caps: foreign patent up to 5 lakh, domestic patent up to 1 lakh, GI registration up to 2 lakh, design registration up to 15000, trademark up to 10000. One-time, not claimable if already claimed under another government scheme.

benefits.name: Equity support for commercialization of ideas/designs/patents
benefits.summary: Equity support to help MSMEs commercialize proven ideas, designs and patents and scale up to raise subsequent funding, through a corpus managed by SIDBI.
benefits.calculation_logic: Up to 1 crore equity support per case, with GoI contribution up to 80pct (80:20 ratio), managed by SIDBI as fund manager.

metadata.notes: Individuals/students must apply through a recognized Host Institute. The 15 lakh per idea is a grant, not a loan. Up to 1 crore infra support is to the Host Institute, not the MSME.

suggested_faqs.question: What is the main objective of MSME Innovative Scheme (Incubation, Design and IPR)?
suggested_faqs.answer: The main objective is to provide assistance and support under MSME Innovative Scheme (Incubation, Design and IPR) to eligible beneficiaries.

suggested_faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for MSME Innovative Scheme (Incubation, Design and IPR)?
suggested_faqs.answer: Businesses belonging to all_msme, startup_dpiit in sector_agnostic may apply.
